sentences.text: Thank you for calling please way and a staff member will be with you shortly this call may be monitored or recorded for quality assurance. Thank you for calling if you are looking for information on renting or leasing an apartment or home please press one. If you are a resident and have a maintenance need please press two. If you are a resident with a non, maintenance related question, please press three. If you are calling for any other reason please press four to repeat these options press nine. If you were looking for information.

conversation.title: Call: Mitch  Scarski  and Noah Bryant @ Trinity Property Consultants
